assumptions: The developer has a supported browser.
No Hugging Face account or Hub repository exist yet.
No product among Hub, Transformers, Datasets, Spaces, or Inference has been preselected.

developer_goal: Create a Hugging Face account and reach one official first developer-platform outcome after selecting a product and artifact type.

first_success.outcome: Depends on the unresolved product choice; for the Hub model-repository guide, a new repository page is visible under the selected namespace.
first_success.observable_signal: For the documented Hub model route, the repository page is visible and prompts to add a Model Card.

route_selection.surface: Hugging Face Hub web documentation and repository UI
route_selection.rule: Official docs organize distinct products without naming one cross-product first-success boundary; do not invent a winner.

candidates.name: Hub model repository via huggingface.co/new
candidates.reason: Documented beginner Hub path, but not named as the universal Hugging Face first success.

candidates.name: Dataset or Space repository creation
candidates.reason: Same Hub surface with different artifact types and success pages.

candidates.name: Local Transformers, Inference API, or other library/hosted routes
candidates.reason: Reach incomparable outcomes versus repository creation.

required_path.action: Choose the Hugging Face product and artifact type that define first success.
required_path.observable_result: One product-scoped official route is selected.

required_path.action: Create a Hugging Face account or sign in.

required_fields.label: Account signup or sign-in inputs
required_fields.notes: huggingface.co/join required JavaScript bot checks and did not expose a stable public field list.

required_path.observable_result: The developer is authenticated on the Hub.

required_path.action: If measuring Hub model repos: open huggingface.co/new, choose Model, owner, name, visibility, optional license, and create the repository.

required_fields.label: License
required_fields.notes: Guide says the license may be left blank.

required_path.observable_result: The new repository page opens and prompts for a Model Card.

prerequisites.description: No Git tooling is required for the Hub web UI repository path.

external_gates.description: A Hugging Face account is required before creating repositories on the Hub.

platform_outcomes.description: The Hub creates the repository under the selected namespace and shows the Model Card prompt.

excluded.item: Adding a Model Card immediately after repo creation
excluded.reason: The getting-started guide calls the Model Card best practice and skips it for a test repo.

excluded.item: Git clone, Git Xet, and hf auth login terminal flows
excluded.reason: Optional relative to the web UI repository creation path.

excluded.item: Uploading model weights or dataset files
excluded.reason: Occurs after the repository page first-success signal in the selected Hub guide.

sources.title: Hugging Face Hub documentation
evidence_supported: Hub as one product surface among broader HF docs

sources.title: Hugging Face join
evidence_supported: JS bot check blocked complete field observation

uncertainties.question: Which Hugging Face product and developer outcome should represent the platform-level slug?
uncertainties.impact: Repository, local model output, Space, dataset, or inference responses produce incomparable paths.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: An explicit workshop choice of one product and one first-success signal before recounting actions.

uncertainties.question: What exact signup fields and verifications does a fresh huggingface.co/join flow require?
uncertainties.impact: Account-creation fields remain unverified behind JS bot protection.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated authenticated or assisted signup walkthrough capturing required join fields.
